name: Configure questionnaire with 'Inherit Notes and Links' and verify 'Unlock' action is executed when Question condition is triggered on 'Completing the page' and check Questionnaire 'Set quality state to' action

steps.name: Configure questionnaire with settings and questions
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })

Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })

Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Alternative email question', exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Alternative email question', exact: true })

Navigate to risk management and link questionnaire
Wait for selector getByText('Questionnaire 1777547140474 Link').getByRole('checkbox', { name: 'ql._id' })
Open questonnaire and verify email questions in page 1 are visible
Wait for selector locator('[data-test-mo-question-name="What is your email?"]')
Verify unlock action is executed when Question condition is triggered on completing the page
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('span').filter({ hasText: 'This is the last page of the questionnaire. Not all pages are completed. Do you want to finish the questionnaire and complete all pages?' })
Verify Quality state set correctly after finishing questionnaire
Scroll into view getByRole('tab', { name: 'mo data' })
Create new version of questionnaire and open questionnaire
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[aria-label="Close current version and start new version"]')
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[aria-label="Close current version and start new version"]')
Click locator('[aria-label="Close current version and start new version"]')
Open questonnaire and  Verify unlock action is executed when Question condition is triggered on Entering the questionnaire the first time
